name: Hicksville Bus Lot LLC
registry_source: NY Department of State (DOS ID 4832246) via bizprofile.net
notes: NY DOS LLC registered 10/9/2015, DOS ID 4832246, registered agent Muriel Dalton at 56 W Church St, Spring Valley NY 10977. No SAFER/FMCSA record found under 'Hicksville Bus Lot' or related variants. The 56 W Church St address is shared with Chestnut Ridge Transportation Inc (USDOT 544893), a school bus operator in The Trans Group family. 'Hicksville Bus Lot LLC' appears to be a real-estate / bus-lot holding entity rather than a federally-registered passenger carrier; no fleet visible at federal level. LEI: 54930060G622ODFKW274.

name: Smart Pick Bus Inc
carrier_operation: Intrastate Only (Non-HM); Auth. For Hire; Passenger
registry_source: NY Department of State (DOS ID 4254960) via opengovus.com
notes: Strong match on address (3100 Cropsey Ave, Brooklyn 11224) under FMCSA legal name 'Smart Pick Inc' (USDOT 1776821, MC-648278). 61 power units / 61 drivers, intrastate passenger for-hire, no safety rating, 0 inspections, 1 injury crash in last 24 mo. NY DOS shows 'Smart Pick Bus Inc' as a separate domestic business corporation (DOS 4254960) filed 6/6/2012 at 2548 W 13th St, Brooklyn 11223. 'Smart Pick Inc' (the FMCSA legal name) is likely the affiliated operating entity at the Cropsey Ave terminal. Both entities active.

name: North American Alliance-Bus
registry_source: Dun & Bradstreet (no NY DOS detail captured)
notes: Address 18 Breezewood Dr, Orchard Park NY 14127 maps to 'North American Alliance of Business Brokers LLC' (D&B-listed, started 2018, ~7 employees, $200k revenue). The '-Bus' in the input list name appears to be a TRUNCATION of 'Business Brokers' rather than indicating a school-bus carrier. No SAFER/FMCSA match found in Orchard Park NY under any 'North American Alliance' variant; the only SAFER hit (NORTH-AMERICAN ALLIANCE INC, USDOT 3071211) is a 1-truck Canadian freight carrier in Cambridge, ON and is NOT a match. Likely a mis-classified non-bus entity that should be removed from the tuck-in universe.

name: K & H Busing
registry_source: PA Department of State Fictitious Name registration (Entity ID 3948905)
notes: Best match is 'K & H Bus Service Inc' (USDOT 2032259, MC-713707), Karen Holzwarth, principal office at 2329 E Hagert St, Philadelphia 19125. PA fictitious name 'K & H Bus Service' registered 4/15/2010 (PA Entity 3948905); BBB shows business start 5/1/2010, LLC structure. SAFER record reports the USDOT INACTIVE; SAFER snapshot shows 1 power unit / 1 driver (likely stale base figures). The 2601 Wheatsheaf Ln Philadelphia 19137 input address is a separate bus-storage/lot location ~1.5mi from the registered HQ on Hagert St; phone (215) 365-3470 is associated with Wheatsheaf. Confidence medium because input address does not exactly match FMCSA address and the carrier is currently INACTIVE in SAFER.

name: NYC Schoolbus Inc
registry_source: NY Department of State (DOS ID 2739942) via nybizdb.com - filed under 'School Bus By Superior Inc.'
notes: Input address 2252 E 59th Pl, Brooklyn 11234 is registered to 'SCHOOL BUS BY SUPERIOR INC' (NY DOS 2739942, Domestic Business Corporation filed 3/8/2002, Kings County, CEO Marisa Delcorso). This is the same family/operating entity as Superior School Bus Co. (NYC office 957 Dean St, Brooklyn 11238; ~55-bus fleet; founded 1988; WBE-certified). No NY DOS or SAFER record found under the literal name 'NYC Schoolbus Inc' — input name is likely a colloquial / data-aggregator label for the Superior School Bus operation at this Brooklyn 11234 lot. SAFER keyword search for 'NYC SCHOOL BUS' and 'SUPERIOR SCHOOL BUS' returned no carrier match (no federal USDOT identified). Carrier appears intrastate-only / not registered with FMCSA under a discoverable name; recommend pulling NYC DOE vendor list and NY DOT BUSNET intrastate carrier records for fleet confirmation.
